my.emptyNone: No submissions yet — go solve a challenge!

results.unrankedTooltip: You need at least {{min}} completed challenges to classify.
results.eloZeroHelp: Want to know why you did not score?
results.aiUnavailable: AI feedback is not available for this submission yet.

submit.limitsLead: These rules apply to every student. They prevent XP farming and keep the leaderboard fair.
submit.staffNote: Staff account: daily limits and cooldown are waived for your submissions.
submit.dailyHint: You can start at most {{max}} runs per challenge per calendar day (UTC).
submit.cooldownHint: After you start a run, you must wait this long before you can submit again for this challenge.
submit.dailyBlockCopy: You have used all {{max}} submissions for this challenge today (UTC). Resets at {{time}}.
submit.cooldownBlockCopy: Wait until the cooldown window ends before submitting again. Next allowed: {{time}} (UTC).
submit.timerHint: Timer runs in real time — even if you leave this page or close the tab.
submit.modalTitle: Do not close this tab or browser
submit.modalCopy: We are building and validating your project. If you interrupt the process now, your submission may fail and you will need to wait for cooldown before submitting again.
submit.modalHint: Uploading ZIP · Sandbox build · Test pipeline
submit.onboardTitle: Do you know how to properly prepare your project before submitting?
submit.onboardCopy: Before your first submission, confirm that you understand the minimum challenge preconfiguration (ZIP structure, `pom.xml` at root, required endpoints and HTTP status codes). This prevents most build errors.
submit.onboardLi1: Your ZIP must open with `pom.xml` at the root.
submit.onboardLi2: Your API must start without extra manual steps.
submit.onboardLi3: You must cover endpoints and status codes expected by the challenge.
